identity.descriptionZh: Tesla 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕媒体内容、工业工具、制造工业、B2B 产品组织页面。
identity.descriptionEn: Electric automotive. Radical subtraction, full-viewport photography, near-zero UI.

display.description: Tesla 的 Design.md 主题展示，围绕媒体内容、工业工具、制造工业、B2B 产品组织页面。
display.descriptionEn: Electric automotive. Radical subtraction, full-viewport photography, near-zero UI.

shadows.label: 阴影 1 - Shadow 1
shadows.description: Box Shadow: `rgba(0,0,0,0) 0px 0px 0px 2px inset` (invisible at rest, animates to visible on focus)

shadows.label: 阴影 2 - Shadow 2
shadows.description: | Level 3 (Subtle) | `rgba(0,0,0,0.05)` | Minimal shadow hints on rare hover states |

borders.label: 边框 1 - Border 1
borders.description: Cloud Gray (`#EEEEEE`): Light borders and divider lines (rgb 238, 238, 238)

borders.label: 边框 2 - Border 2
borders.description: Pure White (`#FFFFFF`): Dominant background color for all surfaces, panels, navigation, and secondary button fills — the canvas that lets photography breathe

borders.label: 边框 3 - Border 3
borders.description: Pewter (`#5C5E62`): Tertiary text for sub-links, secondary navigation links like "Learn" and "Order" (rgb 92, 94, 98)

panels.title: 开发工具界面
panels.body: 适合工作台、文档、控制台和开发者产品。

panels.title: 颜色与字体可复用
panels.body: 页面从本地 metadata 与 Design.md 提取 palette、typography 和标签，用于快速预览主题质感。

panels.title: 面向真实界面片段
panels.body: 按钮、输入、卡片和间距样例保持克制，便于比较不同主题的系统性差异。

do: 建议：Let photography dominate every screen — the product IS the design。
建议：Use Electric Blue ({#3E6AE1}) exclusively for primary CTAs — never for decorative purposes。
建议：Maintain viewport-height sections for major content blocks — one message per screen。
建议：Keep typography at weight 400-500 only — no bold, no light, no extremes。
建议：Use 4px border-radius for all interactive elements — precision over playfulness。
dont: 避免：Add shadows to any element — elevation through shadow contradicts the flat, gallery aesthetic。
避免：Use more than one chromatic color besides the blue CTA — the palette is intentionally monochrome-plus-one。
避免：Apply gradients, patterns, or decorative backgrounds to surfaces — white and photography are the only backgrounds。
避免：Use text larger than 40px on the web — the typography is deliberately restrained even at hero scale。
避免：Add borders to cards or containers — separation is achieved through spacing, not lines。
